testcase.name: Accounts Overview › TC-ACCT-UI-001: accounts overview heading is visible after login @smoke @ui
Accounts Overview › TC-ACCT-UI-002: account number links navigate to account activity @smoke @ui
Accounts Overview › TC-ACCT-UI-003: total balance equals sum of all account balances @regression @ui

property.name: skip
property.value: Parallel loan tests create new accounts that skew the displayed total on staging

testcase.name: Accounts Overview › TC-ACCT-UI-004: unauthenticated access to /overview.htm redirects to login @regression @ui

property.name: skip
property.value: Staging server does not redirect unauthenticated access to /overview.htm

testcase.name: Login › valid credentials redirect to account overview @smoke @ui
Login › invalid credentials display an error message @regression @ui
Bill Pay › TC-BILL-UI-001: successful bill payment with all fields shows confirmation @smoke @ui
Bill Pay › TC-BILL-UI-002: missing payee name shows validation error @regression @ui
Bill Pay › TC-BILL-UI-003: mismatched account number fields show validation error @regression @ui
Bill Pay › TC-BILL-UI-004: missing amount field shows validation error @regression @ui
Find Transactions › TC-FIND-UI-001: search by amount returns matching transactions @smoke @ui
Find Transactions › TC-FIND-UI-002: search by date range returns transactions within range @regression @ui
Find Transactions › TC-FIND-UI-003: search with no matching results shows empty state @regression @ui
Find Transactions › TC-FIND-UI-004: search by transaction ID returns that specific transaction @regression @ui
Request Loan › TC-LOAN-UI-001: loan with sufficient down payment results in approval @smoke @ui
Request Loan › TC-LOAN-UI-002: loan with zero down payment results in denial @regression @ui

property.name: skip
property.value: Staging always approves loans — denial policy not enforced

testcase.name: Request Loan › TC-LOAN-UI-003: missing loan amount shows validation error @regression @ui

property.name: skip
property.value: Staging does not render #amount-error for empty loan amount

testcase.name: Request Loan › TC-LOAN-UI-004: approved loan account appears in accounts overview @regression @ui
Transfer Funds › TC-XFER-UI-001: successful transfer shows confirmation with amount and account refs @smoke @ui
Transfer Funds › TC-XFER-UI-002: empty amount field shows validation error @regression @ui

property.name: skip
property.value: Staging does not surface #amount-error for empty amount

testcase.name: Transfer Funds › TC-XFER-UI-003: non-numeric amount shows validation error @regression @ui

property.name: skip
property.value: Staging does not surface #amount-error for non-numeric amount

testcase.name: Transfer Funds › TC-XFER-UI-004: both account dropdowns are populated @smoke @ui
Transfer Funds › TC-XFER-UI-005: zero amount is accepted and shows transfer confirmation @regression @ui
